items.title_zh: HPE 报告第一季度收入同比增长 18% 至 $9.3B，预计为 $9.37B，云和 AI 收入同比下降 2.7% 至 $6.3B，但报告称 AI 服务器积压为 $5B (Dina Bass/Bloomberg)

items.title: Filing: Anthropic says it had $5B+ in all-time revenue since 2023 and could lose billions after clients paused deal talks due to supply-chain risk designation (Paresh Dave/Wired)
items.title_en: Filing: Anthropic says it had $5B+ in all-time revenue since 2023 and could lose billions after clients paused deal talks due to supply-chain risk designation (Paresh Dave/Wired)
items.title_zh: 归档：Anthropic 表示，自 2023 年以来，该公司的历史收入超过 50 亿美元，在客户因供应链风险指定而暂停交易谈判后，该公司可能会损失数十亿美元（Paresh Dave/Wired）
